adsFeatures.title: CRM-Integrated Campaigns
adsFeatures.desc: Every campaign is fed by real CRM data, including lead quality, stage, and revenue close rates.

adsFeatures.title: AI-Powered Optimization
adsFeatures.desc: AI agents continuously analyze ad performance and adjust targeting, bids, and creative strategy.

adsFeatures.title: Closed-Loop Attribution

adsFeatures.title: Intent-Based Targeting
adsFeatures.desc: Target audiences based on behavioral signals and CRM segments for maximum conversion.

webServices.title: UX/UI Excellence
webServices.desc: Every pixel is purposeful. We design for seamless user journeys that convert visitors into customers.

webServices.title: SEO & Performance

aiChannels.WhatsApp: Automated and humanized conversations for qualification, support, and closing.
aiChannels.Instagram: DM automation for leads from social content and ads.
aiChannels.Telegram: Group and direct message bots for customer segments.
aiChannels.Email: Intelligent sequences, follow-ups, and re-engagement campaigns.
aiChannels.Web Chat: Embedded chat bots on your website for 24/7 lead capture and support.

hero.label: Core Product
hero.title: Optomyze CRM
hero.subtitle: The Heart of the Ecosystem
hero.description: The command center for every customer relationship: unified messaging, AI-scored pipelines, native ad analytics, and automation that runs while you sleep.

glance.label: Platform at a Glance
glance.heading: One Login. Every Tool Your Team Needs.
glance.description: From first contact to closed deal, Optomyze CRM replaces a stack of disconnected tools with a single, connected workspace.

inbox.label: Unified Communications
inbox.heading: Every Conversation. One Inbox.
inbox.description: Centralize customer communication across WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook Messenger in a single workspace, eliminating channel switching and improving response times. Tag leads, share files and locations, and keep full context on every customer without leaving the inbox.
points: WhatsApp, Instagram & Messenger in one screen
Full lead context next to every conversation

pipeline.label: CRM & Pipeline Management
pipeline.heading: From First Contact to Closed Deal, Fully Visible.
pipeline.description: Two purpose-built pipelines, one for leads and one for deals, give your team a real-time view of every opportunity. AI scoring flags your hottest leads automatically, so reps spend time selling instead of guessing who to call next.

analytics.label: Reporting & Analytics
analytics.heading: Revenue Numbers You Can Actually Trust.
analytics.description: Live dashboards turn pipeline activity into forecastable revenue: funnel stage breakdowns, monthly closed vs. lost revenue, and full conversation SLA reporting, including first response time, resolution rate, and performance by agent and channel.

adtech.label: Marketing & Campaign Performance
adtech.heading: Google & Meta Ads, Inside Your CRM.
adtech.description: Native Google Ads and Meta Ads dashboards connect ad spend directly to closed revenue, not just clicks. See campaign-level ROAS, spot your best and worst performers, and stop guessing which channel actually pays for itself.

customer.label: Customer Management
customer.heading: One Profile. Every Customer Touchpoint.
customer.description: Every customer record tells the full story: every conversation, every stage change, every decision your sales team made along the way. Recognize buying patterns before your competitors do, manage information and documents in one place, and schedule tasks and appointments without ever leaving the customer's record.
points: Full customer journey tracked from first contact to close
Documents, tasks, and appointments in one record
Stay in touch through WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger threads

calendar.label: Scheduling & Calendar
calendar.heading: Every Appointment, Linked to a Lead.
calendar.description: Optomyze Calendar keeps every meeting, check-in, and follow-up tied to the customer record behind it, automatically generating appointments from lead activity so nothing falls through the cracks.

cta.description: Join companies transforming their operations with Optomyze CRM.

items.title: Google Calendar Sync

items.desc: Send and receive SMS directly from the CRM using Twilio's reliable messaging infrastructure.

items.title: Global CRM Automation
items.desc: A native automation engine built directly into the CRM. Build complex workflows without leaving the platform or relying on third-party tools.

items.title: VoIP Calling
items.desc: Native call center capabilities — make and receive calls, log recordings and coach agents from within the CRM.

items.title: Native AI Agents
items.desc: AI agents built directly into the multi-channel inbox to qualify leads automatically, answering questions, capturing intent, and routing only sales-ready conversations to your team.

items.title: Telegram Integration
items.desc: Add Telegram as another unified inbox channel alongside WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger.
